title: Proximal Tubule Calcium Reabsorption
buzzwords: handles roughly seventy percent of filtered load
no hormonal control of this cation here
thiazide-induced ECF contraction boosts uptake here

title: Thick Ascending Limb Calcium Reabsorption
buzzwords: handles about twenty percent of filtered calcium
potential generated by NKCC2 and ROMK activity
basolateral divalent cation sensor reduces uptake

title: Distal Convoluted Tubule Calcium Reabsorption
buzzwords: fine-tuning site for divalent cation handling
handles roughly ten percent of filtered load
basolateral Ca2+-ATPase and Na+/Ca2+ antiporter exit
thiazide-sensitive segment that boosts uptake here

title: Proximal Tubule Phosphate Reabsorption (Na-Phosphate Cotransporter)
buzzwords: site of nearly all phosphate reclamation
secondary active transport on apical membrane
sodium gradient powers uphill anion movement
exits basolaterally via organic anion transporter
high dietary intake suppresses this transporter

title: Parathyroid Hormone (PTH)
buzzwords: released in response to low ionized calcium
raises serum calcium, lowers serum phosphate

title: Calcitriol (Active Vitamin D)
buzzwords: active hormone made from a fat-soluble vitamin
increases gut absorption of two key minerals
synthesized by kidney enzyme on filtered substrate
deficient in CKD-mineral and bone disorder

title: Fibroblast Growth Factor-23 (FGF-23)
buzzwords: bone-derived hormone responding to anion load
secreted by osteocytes when phosphate rises
elevated early in chronic kidney disease
